title: End Remastered Remastered
description: Enhances the looks of End Remastered's eyes & other items.
body:
Enhances the looks of End Remastered by retexturing all its items to a more modern and cleaner style.

![Some of the retextured eyes!](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/f3e25e7a7b7a16ba06aaaa13975edf2896f9ff09.png)

- You may include this resource pack in publicly distributed modpacks

- Do NOT redistribute this resource pack itself!
